title: Bluey Travel Magnetic Scribbler pad with pen and 3 stamps, draw and erase with no mess, Blue
features: No mess way for drawing fun!
Slide the bar to erase and start again!
Includes 3 cute shaped stamps for extra fun
Light and portable for easy travel
description: Product Description Have hours of drawing fun with this lightweight, magnetic drawing tablet. Draw and erase again and again! Includes magnetic drawing pen and 3 fun shaped stamps. Have fun drawing your favourite Bluey characters. It's fun drawing with no mess! Perfect on-the-go creative fun, and a great size to take with you anywhere. Safety Warning Choking Hazard Small Parts
